Hello, 

First of all, first if all sorry that this took some time 
to reply. You might want to contact sos@FreeBSD.org to get 
more information on how to contribute the code, he is our 
main ata guru and might help and or reference the required 
steps the best. 

Thanks for your willingness to support FreeBSD!
